entryTransfer.pickGroupCopyHint: Create a copy at the end of the selected group.
entryTransfer.pickGroupMoveHint: Move this entry to the end of the selected group.

auth.setupHint: Set a username and password for the seed account to get started.
auth.loginHint: Sign in with your username and password. Check “Default on this device” to skip sign-in next time.
auth.rememberDefault: Default user (stay signed in on this device, survives server restart)
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

prompts.lede: Manage groups and prompt entries (triggers, injection positions) for assembling outbound chat messages.
prompts.stImportConfirmLead: Detected a SillyTavern OpenAI preset JSON file. It will be converted into an arousalPub prompt preset.
prompts.stImportConfirmBulletOrder: Entry order follows ST prompt_order; customs between system groups join the preceding system group.
prompts.stImportConfirmBulletEnabled: Enabled toggles match ST for custom entries; required binding slots follow this app’s rules.
prompts.stImportConfirmBulletEdit: After import you can edit it like any preset; system blocks cannot be deleted.
prompts.presetDeleteDialogBody: Delete preset “{name}”? All entries inside will be removed.
prompts.groupDisableCustomEntriesTooltip: Disables only user entries; system entries are unaffected
prompts.groupDeleteDialogBody: Delete group “{name}”? All entries inside will be removed.
prompts.groupBoundDescCharacter: User persona card body (always injected), separate from the character block below.
prompts.groupBoundDescCharCore: Injects character description (always) + system_prompt (toggle on this entry) as one block.
prompts.groupBoundDescWorld: Injects lorebook retrieval for this chat (constant + keyword matches).
prompts.groupBoundDescHistory: Injects chat context as one block: recent history (always), then post_history (toggle on this entry).
prompts.groupBoundHistoryTokenTrim: Oldest history is dropped first when over the token cap.
prompts.groupBoundDescUserInput: Placeholder for the user message of the current turn.
prompts.groupBoundDragHint: Drag this block to move it; drag custom entries above or below it to set injection order.
prompts.boundCharSystemPromptListHint: Maps to Character Card V2 system_prompt. When the card field is empty, no message is injected, but this slot must remain in the preset.
prompts.boundCharSystemPromptEditorDesc: When disabled, card system_prompt is omitted even if the card has content. Not editable here. Character description always injects regardless of this toggle.
prompts.boundCharDescriptionListHint: Maps to Character Card V2 description from bound character cards.
prompts.boundCharDescriptionEditorDesc: Content comes from bound character cards. Not editable here.
prompts.boundCharPersonalityListHint: Maps to Character Card V2 personality.
prompts.boundCharPersonalityEditorDesc: Content comes from bound character cards. Not editable here.
prompts.boundScenarioListHint: Maps to Character Card V2 scenario.
prompts.boundScenarioEditorDesc: Content comes from bound character cards. Not editable here.
prompts.boundChatHistoryEditorDesc: Recent chat history always injects. Not editable.
prompts.boundCharacterListHintSystem: AI character card system_prompt and body from chat bindings.
prompts.boundWorldListHint: Maps to lorebook retrieval bound to this chat.
prompts.boundCharacterListHintPost: Maps to Character Card V2 post_history_instructions; content comes from bound character cards.
prompts.boundUserInputListHint: Maps to the user message sent this turn (not the persona card).
prompts.boundUserPersonaListHint: User persona card chosen at conversation creation; always injected.
prompts.boundCharacterEditorDescSystem: When disabled, card system_prompt is omitted even if the card has content. Not editable here. Character body always injects regardless of this toggle.
prompts.boundWorldEditorDesc: Required injection point. Shows a placeholder when nothing is bound.
prompts.boundCharacterEditorDescPost: When disabled, post_history is not injected. Not editable here. Recent chat history in the system block above is unaffected and always injects.
prompts.boundUserPersonaEditorDesc: User persona always injects; cannot disable or edit. Cannot be dragged above the character block.
prompts.characterBundleHint: Character and user persona blocks inject separately; user block cannot rank above character block.
prompts.searchPlaceholder: Search title, description, body, or tags…
prompts.emptyHint: Adjust the filters, or create a new prompt.
prompts.descriptionPlaceholder: One sentence on the tone and scene of this prompt.
prompts.contentHint: Plain text. Injected as the chosen role when sent to the model.
prompts.positionRelativeHint: Concatenated in the group's display order.
prompts.positionChatHint: Inserted at a specific depth in the assembled message stream.
prompts.depthHint: 0 = bottom of prompt, larger = higher up
prompts.orderHint: Priority at the same depth, smaller goes first (default 100)
prompts.triggersHint: Tick to enable only for those scenes; none ticked = always enabled.
prompts.editorEmptyHint: Or create a new one. Changes auto-save under your user folder (data/{userId}/prompts/).

lorebooks.lede: Organize lore as book → group → entry. Bound chats inject matched entries into the world/lorebook prompt slot (constant + keyword match).
lorebooks.bookDeleteBody: Delete “{name}”? Bound chats will stop injecting this lorebook.
lorebooks.groupDeleteBody: Delete group “{name}” and all its entries?
lorebooks.emptyHint: Click “New entry” above to add the first one.
lorebooks.editorEmptyHint: Or create a new one. Changes auto-save under your user folder (data/{userId}/lorebooks/).
lorebooks.entryContentPlaceholder: Lore text injected into the model…
lorebooks.entryKeysHint: In keyword mode, add at least one keyword (comma-separated); saved on blur or Enter
lorebooks.entryMissingKeysAlert: Keyword trigger is on but no keywords are set—this entry will not be injected. Add keywords or switch to always inject.
lorebooks.triggerVectorHint: Saving the lorebook indexes this entry for vectors. At assemble time, scan corpus (user + memory + history) is used for semantic TopK. Enable vector search under Settings → Lorebooks.
lorebooks.packageImportConfirmBody: Append “{name}” from the file to your list (renamed if id or name conflicts) and save to the server. Continue?

characters.lede: Import and manage character cards. “Used” means at least one chat references this card (by character ID).
characters.loadFailed: Could not load. Check your connection and try again.
characters.createDialogHint: Saved as a PNG with embedded chara metadata (ST v2–compatible). Optionally upload a PNG portrait; otherwise the server default image is used. Bind from a chat sidebar, or export JSON for debugging.
characters.fieldAlternateGreetingsHint: Each line is its own collapsible block; the list scrolls. Count shows non-empty / total slots.
characters.editDialogHint: Changes are merged into the card and saved on the server; chats still reference this card by the same character id.
characters.listHint: Select an entry for details; bind cards to a chat from the chat sidebar.
characters.previewNoSelection: This panel previews a character card. Pick a card from the list below to see its summary, tags, and system prompt. Use the toolbar to create or import; when a card is selected you can edit, export, or delete it here.
characters.emptyHint: Use “New character” or “Import JSON / PNG”, or adjust search and filters.
characters.portraitPickHint: Optional; must be PNG. If omitted on create, the server default portrait is used.
characters.footerNote: Cards are stored on the server (see deployment notes).

settings.intro: Application preferences. API keys and model options stay in the right-hand Connection panel.
settings.chatFontSizeHint: Message and composer text size. Default is 1rem (~16px).
settings.composerEnterHint: Applies to the chat composer immediately after you choose; Shift+Enter also inserts a new line.
settings.composerEnterSend: Enter to send, Ctrl+Enter for new line
settings.composerCtrlEnterSend: Ctrl+Enter to send, Enter for new line
settings.chunkSectionHint: Max turns per on-disk chunk file. Changes apply only to new chunks; existing chunks keep their original capacity.
settings.themeColorsHint: Theme changes apply immediately. Click the swatch to edit primary (OKLCH); confirm to save.
settings.themePrimaryHint: Click the swatch to open the editor.
settings.homeSectionHint: Default view and character grid scope when you open home or return from a chat. Toggles and search on home are not saved; each return to home restores these defaults and clears search.
settings.homeCharacterSourceHint: Applies only to the home “Characters” view; use the sidebar for the full library.
settings.accountAdminConsoleHint: Open via 127.0.0.1 on this machine only; sign in with the seed account.
settings.accountDefaultUserHint: When on, you stay signed in locally across server restarts. When off, sign in again after 15 minutes idle or a server restart.
settings.accountDefaultUserOn: Default user enabled on this device
settings.accountDefaultUserOff: Default user disabled on this device
settings.accountDeleteHint: Permanently removes your data folder and registry entry. Type your username to confirm.

accountApiErrors.username_mismatch: Username does not match your account
accountApiErrors.cannot_delete_seed_only: Cannot delete the only seed account. Change its password or register another user first.
accountApiErrors.password_too_short: New password must be at least 6 characters

settings.buildVersionHint: Git commit time; auto-rebuild after pull when you start the app.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.intro: Enable or disable plugins, reorder hook execution, and configure per-plugin options. Order applies to your account only.

settings.writeChatPromptHint: When enabled, the server writes chat-audit.json after send/regenerate (messages, assembly hits, outbound calls). When disabled, nothing new is written; existing entries remain viewable on assistant turns.
settings.promptSnapshotMaxStoredHint: 1–200. Synced to the conversation auditDebug (enabled + maxStored) when you open it.
settings.lorebookSectionHint: New conversations inherit these defaults; override per chat in conversation settings.
settings.loreMaxRecursionDepthHint: 0 = first pass only; 1–3 = extra passes (max 3). Default 2.
settings.loreKeywordTopKHint: 1–64. Max keyword/recursive hits; independent from vector TopK. Token overage uses budget trim.
settings.loreVectorTopKHint: 1–20. Max vector-trigger hits; independent from keyword TopK. Token overage uses budget trim.
settings.historySectionHint: How many past turns to inject when assembling prompts. When off, trimming follows context length.
settings.historyMaxTurnsHint: 1–200. One turn = one user send + assistant reply (stored turn).
settings.memorySectionHint: When enabled, embeds the previous assistant reply plus the current user message to recall related turns from LanceDB. Configure a separate Embeddings API below (not the chat API in Connection).
settings.budgetTrimSectionHint: When over the connection context limit, drop trimmable items one by one in the order below. Higher rows are dropped first. Minimum retain counts on the right (0 allows dropping all).
settings.budgetTrimOrderHint: Drag to set trim order; top rows are dropped first.
settings.budgetTrimDefaultsNote: Defaults: lore → memory → history; min retain {lore} / {memory} / {history} each.

regexRules.sectionHint: User-level rules applied to all conversations when enabled. Drag to set execution order (top runs first). Changes save automatically.
regexRules.pipelineTestHint: Apply all rules in list order. Phases, fields, and skip-last-N are not simulated. Only enabled rules perform replacements.
regexRules.empty: No rules yet. Add one to get started.
regexRules.label: Label

flagDesc.g: Global: find all matches, not just the first.
flagDesc.m: Multiline: line-start and line-end anchors apply to each line.
flagDesc.u: Unicode: treat pattern and string as Unicode code points.
flagDesc.y: Sticky: match only from the last match end position.
flagDesc.d: Indices: match results include capture start/end offsets.

regexRules.replacementEmptyHint: When empty, matched text is removed entirely. Line breaks are literal; $1, $&, etc. follow JavaScript replacement syntax.
regexRules.skipLastNTurnsHint: 0 = apply to all turns including the latest. N > 0 skips the most recent N turns.
regexRules.testHint: Preview this rule on sample text locally (works even when the rule is disabled). Does not simulate phases, fields, or skipLastNTurns.
regexRules.deleteConfirmBody: This cannot be undone. The rule will be removed from your settings.
regexRules.persistRetroHint: After editing rules that include the Persist phase, use batch apply on past turns in conversation settings.

validation.regex_exec_timeout: Regex execution timed out; original text kept.
validation.phases_fields_required: Select at least one phase and one field.

settings.embeddingApiSectionHint: Separate from the chat API; used only for long-term memory indexing and recall.
settings.embeddingDimensionsHint: Leave empty for the model default. Only some OpenAI-compatible APIs support this (e.g. text-embedding-3-*).
settings.embeddingTestTextHint: This text is sent to the Embeddings API when you run the test.
settings.hybridFtsProfileHint: BM25 tokenization for long-term memory and lorebook vector search. After changing, rebuild memory indexes per conversation.

hybridFtsDictVariant.big: Large dictionary (~8.2 MB, better for Traditional Chinese)

hybridFtsSwitch.title: Switch Hybrid tokenizer
hybridFtsSwitch.rebuildWarning: After switching, rebuild the memory index manually for each conversation with long-term memory enabled.
hybridFtsSwitch.dictSectionHint: Choose a jieba dictionary size. Downloaded sizes switch instantly; others will download here.
hybridFtsSwitch.manualHint: If download fails, fetch the file from the repository, save it as dict.txt under your user data directory at the dictionary file path shown (relative to data/{userId}/), then retry.

settings.memoryTopKHint: 1–20. Deduplicated against the recent history window.

chat.title: Chat
chat.hintConfigureApi: Add your API key and model in the Connection panel on the right.
chat.deleteVariantConfirm: Remove this assistant reply? Another version will be shown if available.
chat.deleteTurnConfirm: Delete this whole turn (user message and all assistant replies)?
chat.emptyHint: Type a message below and send.
chat.composerPlaceholderEnterSend: Message · Enter to send, Ctrl+Enter for new line
chat.composerPlaceholderCtrlEnterSend: Message · Ctrl+Enter to send, Enter for new line
chat.authorsNoteTooltipOn: Author's note on · Click to edit
chat.authorsNoteTooltipOff: Author's note off · Click to configure
chat.previewAssembleHint: Requires Settings → Debug → session debug audit. Assembled on the server from the composer and conversation settings, same as Send (plugin hooks excluded).
chat.previewAssembleMemoryRebuildHint: The long-term memory vector index may be corrupt or incomplete. Rebuild it under Conversation settings → Context → memory recall, then try again.
chat.turnPromptEmpty: No audit entry for this turn. Enable session debug audit under Settings → Debug, then send or regenerate.
chat.turnAuditNoPerformance: No performance audit data (enable debug audit)

convSettings.title: This conversation
convSettings.tabBindingsHint: Prompt preset, user/assistant characters, and lorebooks. Changes save immediately.
convSettings.tabApiHint: Choose a chat preset and override sampling params for this conversation. Embedding connection stays global; only model and dimensions can differ.
convSettings.tabLoreHint: Retrieval and recursion for this conversation (can override global settings).
convSettings.tabContextHint: History window and long-term memory recall in the prompt.
convSettings.tabBudgetTrimHint: When over the connection context limit, drop matched lore, memory, or history one item at a time. Override global defaults here if needed.
convSettings.budgetTrimInheritGlobalHint: Uses trim order and minimum retain counts from Settings → Budget trim.
convSettings.charactersHint: Multi-select; order is primary vs. extra slots. Changes save to the conversation immediately.
convSettings.userCharacterHint: Your persona card in this chat; changing it updates the avatar and sets the prompt macro name to the card name.
convSettings.userNameHint: Used for the `\{\{user\}\}` macro in prompts and cards; leave empty to use the default label.
convSettings.userNameSnapshotSuffix: (synced from your user card when this chat was created; macro:
convSettings.lorebooksHint: Multi-select; order affects merge injection. Changes save to the conversation immediately.
convSettings.loreInheritGlobalHint: Using defaults from Settings; turn off to customize this conversation.
convSettings.loreRecursiveHint: When on, after the first pass on user input, matched entry text is scanned again for keywords (up to the depth below).
convSettings.loreMaxRecursionDepthHint: 0 = first pass only; 1–3 = extra passes (max 3). Default 2.
convSettings.historyInheritGlobalHint: Using defaults from Settings; turn off to customize this conversation.
convSettings.historyLimitHint: Off: inject all available history; oldest messages drop when over context. On: only the last N turns.
convSettings.historyMaxTurnsHint: 1–200. One turn = one stored turn (user + assistant).
convSettings.memoryInheritGlobalHint: Using defaults from Settings; turn off to override for this chat.
convSettings.memoryEnabledHint: Vector-recall past turns (query = previous assistant + current user).
convSettings.memoryTopKHint: 1–20. Excludes turns already in recent history.
convSettings.memoryRebuildHint: Re-embed all turns and bound lorebooks for long-term memory recall.
convSettings.memoryRebuildMismatchHint: Indexed model or Hybrid tokenizer differs from global settings, or no index exists yet — rebuild recommended.
convSettings.tabAuthorsNoteHint: Session-level prompt injected at a depth before send; supports \{\{user\}\} and other macros.
convSettings.tabPluginsHint: Per-conversation settings for enabled plugins; separate from global defaults in Settings → Plugins.
convSettings.pluginTabEmpty: No enabled plugins with conversation settings. Enable plugins in Settings → Plugins.
convSettings.pluginLoadFailed: Failed to load plugin conversation settings
convSettings.authorsNoteEnabledHint: Cannot enable when content is empty; when off, nothing is injected.
convSettings.authorsNoteContentHint: Saved automatically when the field loses focus.
convSettings.authorsNoteDepthHint: Messages from the bottom of the stack; 0 = last position. Default 4.
convSettings.defaultAuthorsNoteIntro: Applies to new chats only (copied once into each new conversation). Does not change this chat. Use \{\{defaultAuthorsNote\}\} in presets to reference this template.
convSettings.defaultAuthorsNoteContentHint: Saved automatically when the field loses focus.
convSettings.defaultAuthorsNoteEnabledForNewChats: Enabled by default for new chats
convSettings.defaultAuthorsNoteEnabledForNewChatsHint: When content is non-empty, new chats copy content, depth, and role; if off, content is copied but injection stays disabled.
convSettings.defaultAuthorsNoteDepthHint: Injection depth written into new chats; existing chats are unchanged.
convSettings.tabRegexApplyHint: Re-apply Persist rules to past turns (view-only rules; check to run).
convSettings.regexApplyHint: Only enabled rules with the Persist phase apply. No rules are selected by default; dry-run first to see affected turns.
convSettings.regexApplyNoPersistRules: No enabled Persist rules. Configure them under Settings → Regex rules.
convSettings.regexApplyOrdinalHint: Turns are 0-based; this conversation has turns 0–{max}.
convSettings.regexApplyDryRunResult: Dry run: {total} turns in range, {changed} would change.
convSettings.regexApplyMemoryQueued: History updated; rebuilding vectors for {count} turn(s).

errors.persistFirstTurnFailed: Failed to save the first turn on the server
errors.persistAppendTurnFailed: Failed to append this turn on the server

conversationList.searchPlaceholder: Search title, character names, or tags
conversationList.deleteDialogBody: Delete “{title}”? Local data will be removed and cannot be recovered.
conversationList.loadFailed: Could not load the conversation list
conversationList.createDialogHint: Choose a user card and primary character. The default lorebook is pre-selected; clear the field to use no lorebook. \{\{user\}\} is snapshotted from the user card name; the opening only comes from the first character slot.
conversationList.lorebookSelectHint: Default lorebook is pre-selected. Select multiple or clear for no lorebook injection.

characterConversations.empty: No conversations bound to this character

chatConversation.loadFailed: Could not load or create this conversation
chatConversation.memoryRebuildBody: The global embedding model or Hybrid tokenizer does not match this conversation's index snapshot. Rebuild this conversation's memory index and bound lorebook vector entries.

conn.needBaseAndKey: Enter Base URL and API Key first
conn.saveFailedJson: Save failed: custom parameters must be a valid JSON object
conn.storageHint: API keys and parameters are read/written by the local backend to {path} (do not commit); you can save multiple presets.
conn.presetEditHint: Choose which preset entry to edit for connection and model fields
conn.testResultSuccessHint: Both phases passed (API reachable and model replied).
conn.testResultPartialHint: Models list OK, but chat test failed.
conn.testResultReplyTruncated: Reply looks like a gateway/reasoning truncation notice, not normal content. Connectivity is OK; disable "Request reasoning chain" or use a non-reasoning model for a short reply.
conn.needModelForTest: Enter or select a model ID before testing connection
conn.deletePresetBlocked: Cannot delete: preset is still referenced
conn.deleteKeyBlocked: Cannot delete: key is still referenced
conn.linkedPromptPresetHint: When you switch to this API preset, the selected prompt preset is applied automatically. Clear to disable.
conn.apiExportHint: Model and generation parameters are always included. Optionally add the fields below.
conn.apiImportHint: Adds a new API preset (alias auto-renamed if needed). Choose which fields to apply from the file.
conn.apiImportApplyLinkedPreset: Import embedded prompt preset and link to the new API preset
conn.apiImportedSnackbar: Imported as a new API preset. Save settings when ready.
conn.apiImportParseFailed: Could not parse the import file
conn.apiKeyAliasHint: Pick a saved key, or use "Direct (not saved)" to type a value used only by this preset.
conn.apiKeyDirectHint: Not aliased: the key is stored only on this API preset.
conn.apiKeyFromAliasHint: Provided by alias "{alias}"; edits sync to the keychain.
conn.apiKeyEmpty: API key is empty, cannot save as alias
conn.apiKeyManagerHint: Manage keys here. Deleting an alias makes API presets fall back to direct input.
conn.apiKeyManagerEmpty: No aliased keys yet. Click "Add key" to start.
conn.modelHint: Click to open the list and filter; you can also edit in the dialog
conn.requestReasoningChainHint: Merge reasoning-related fields into the upstream body (default: thinking.enabled); override via custom JSON if needed
conn.showReasoningChainHint: UI only; you can still request reasoning from the model but hide it
conn.topKHint: Not in the official OpenAI API; some gateways support it
conn.dryHint: llama.cpp / compatible gateway fields; omitted when empty
conn.dryPenaltyLastNHint: Penalize only the last N tokens; empty means no limit
conn.drySequenceBreakersHint: One item per line; use \n for a newline character
conn.customParamsHint: Merged into the request body for gateway extras only (cannot override messages/model). Example:
conn.emptyModels: No models returned (empty list or no data).
conn.manualModelHint: Synced with the sidebar; picking a list item fills this and closes the dialog

errors.active_receive_index_must_be_integer: active receive index must be integer
errors.backup_in_progress: Data backup in progress, try again later
errors.character_ids_must_be_string_array: character ids must be string array
errors.character_not_found_or_no_png: character not found or no png
errors.conversation_api_preset_chat_invalid: apiPreset.chat must be an object or null
errors.conversation_api_preset_forbidden_field: apiPreset.chat forbids connection fields such as baseUrl or apiKey
errors.conversation_api_preset_dry_breakers_arr: apiPreset.chat.dryBreakers must be a string array
errors.conversation_embedding_api_invalid: embeddingApiSettings must be an object or null
errors.conversation_embedding_api_forbidden_fie: embeddingApiSettings forbids connection fields such as baseUrl or apiKey
errors.embedding_api_api_key_id_invalid: embedding api api key id invalid
errors.chunk_chain_broken: Chunk chain is broken; cannot rebuild head/tail
errors.authors_note_invalid: authorsNote must be an object or null
errors.authors_note_requires_field: authorsNote requires enabled, content, injectionDepth, and/or role
errors.authors_note_role_invalid: authorsNote.role must be system or user
errors.default_authors_note_invalid: defaultAuthorsNote must be an object or null
errors.global_default_authors_note_requires_fie: defaultAuthorsNote requires at least one field
errors.lorebook_ids_must_be_string_array: lorebook ids must be string array
errors.lorebook_settings_max_recursion_depth_nu: lorebook settings max recursion depth number
errors.lorebook_settings_keyword_top_k_number: lorebook settings keyword top k number
errors.lorebook_settings_vector_top_k_number: lorebook settings vector top k number
errors.memory_vector_index_corrupt: Long-term memory vector index is corrupt or incomplete; rebuild the index
errors.memory_settings_memory_top_k_number: memory settings memory top k number
errors.budget_trim_settings_invalid: budgetTrimSettings must be an object or null
errors.budget_trim_trim_order_invalid: trimOrder must be a permutation of lore, memory, history
errors.budget_trim_min_retain_requires_field: minRetain requires at least one of lore, memory, history
errors.missing_api_key: Missing API key (configure it in Settings first)
errors.api_key_in_use: This key is still referenced and cannot be deleted
errors.api_preset_in_use: This API preset is still referenced and cannot be deleted
errors.api_preset_last_one: At least one API preset must remain
errors.api_preset_chat_test_failed: Models list OK, but chat test failed
errors.patch_conversation_requires_field: Provide title, auditDebug, characterIds, promptPresetId, lorebookIds, lorebookSettings, historySettings, memorySettings, budgetTrimSettings, userCharacterId, userName, authorsNote, apiPreset, and/or embeddingApiSettings
errors.plugin_complete_stream_not_supported: plugin completion does not support streaming
errors.plugin_complete_context_length_unconfigu: API preset has no context length configured
errors.prompts_seed_put_rejected: Seed preset PUT is not allowed; prompts are initialized only when a user is created
errors.regex_apply_text_required: text is required for regex apply
errors.regex_batch_invalid_range: invalid turn range for regex batch apply
errors.prompts_not_initialized: Prompt library is not initialized; sign in again or contact an administrator
errors.turns_batch_too_large: Too many turns in one batch update (max 50). Narrow the turn range and try again.
